# API reference

The exact public API of `@jsvision/ui`, `@jsvision/web`, and `@jsvision/files` — every export's constructor/options/methods/types with the one-line intent from its source JSDoc. **Consult this before reading the SDK source:** if you need a prop name, a method signature, or a type, it is here. The pages are generated from the source, so they never drift.

When you already know which widget you want, open its category page and copy the signature. When you are choosing a widget, start from `../component-catalog.md`; for how to compose them, see `../recipes/index.md` and `../layout.md`.

## Categories

- [Reactivity](./reactivity.md) — Signals, computeds, effects, and reactive control flow. (18 exports)
- [Layout & view system](./layout-views.md) — The `col`/`row`/`stack` DSL, `View`/`Group`, layout props, and the render root. (43 exports)
- [Controls](./controls.md) — Leaf input widgets and the `Input` validators. (21 exports)
- [Containers, scrolling, lists & tabs](./containers.md) — Scroll bars, scrollers, list views, dialogs, dropdowns, and tabs. (36 exports)
- [Data views](./data-views.md) — The `DataGrid` table and the `Tree` outline. (11 exports)
- [Feedback](./feedback.md) — Progress bars and spinners. (10 exports)
- [Date & color pickers](./date-color.md) — Calendars, date pickers, color swatches, and color pickers. (20 exports)
- [Surfaces & terminal](./surfaces-terminal.md) — Offscreen surfaces and the scrollback terminal view. (8 exports)
- [Text editing](./text-editing.md) — The multi-line `Editor`, `Memo`, and edit-window chrome. (27 exports)
- [App shell](./app-shell.md) — Application, desktop, windows, menus, status line, and the event loop. (39 exports)
- [Core essentials](./core-essentials.md) — Capabilities, input, keymaps, and style re-exported from `@jsvision/core`. (8 exports)
- [@jsvision/web — browser runtime](./web.md) — Mount an app in an xterm.js terminal; the in-memory browser file system. (17 exports)
- [@jsvision/files — file dialogs & editor](./files.md) — File/dir dialogs, the file-system seam, and the openers. (34 exports)
